message:
feat(cli): implement pt agent export-priors command

Add handler for agent export-priors subcommand to export configured
priors to a JSON file for transfer between machines. Supports:
- Custom output path via --out/-o flag
- Host profile tagging via --host-profile flag
- Atomic writes via temp file + rename

Also add visible_alias "robot" for agent subcommand.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
